title: Mastering Node.js Streams
description: Learn how to efficiently handle large datasets using Node.js streams. This talk covers readable, writable, and transform streams with practical examples.

title: Modern CSS Layouts: Grid & Flexbox
description: A deep dive into creating responsive and complex layouts using CSS Grid and Flexbox without the need for heavy frameworks.

title: Building Accessible Web Applications
description: Ensure your web applications are usable by everyone. We'll discuss semantic HTML, ARIA roles, and keyboard navigation strategies.

title: The Power of TypeScript in Large Scale Apps
description: Explore how TypeScript enhances maintainability and type safety in complex codebases. Learn advanced types and structural typing.

title: Securing Your Express APIs
description: Common security pitfalls in Express and how to avoid them. Learn about Helmet, rate limiting, and JWT authentication best practices.

title: Optimizing Frontend Performance
description: Strategies for improving PageSpeed and Core Web Vitals. Focus on lazy loading, image optimization, and code splitting.
